items.title: Sporting director Hughes set to leave Reds next year

items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED have signed teenage goalkeeper Kit Margetson as a free agent from Swansea City. items.title: Soumillon ruled to aided Gstaad at Royal Ascot but ban reduced on appeal

items.title: Pollock remains on bench as Furbank makes England XV to face South Africa
items.summary: George Furbank will make his first England start since 2024 after being selected for Saturday's Nations Championship opener against South Africa, while Henry Pollock remains on the bench.
